name: DES-1B "Grainmill"
description: An upgraded Dustwalker, the Grainmill adds a third centrifugal drum in a cascade configuration — the first two drums perform coarse and fine separation while the third re-processes the fine reject stream to recover ice grains missed on the first pass. Regolith throughput increases to 7.5 t/hr and water extraction rises proportionally to 208 kg/hr. The additional drum and larger intake conveyor push dry mass to 16 tonnes, while the second electric motor doubles power draw to 0.6 MW. The Grainmill also introduces a vibro-fluidized bed upstream of the drums that pre-loosens compacted regolith, reducing mechanical wear and improving separation efficiency in the cohesive soils found at many lunar highland sites.
